title: BeneficiaryCertificationCompletionTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of certification completion required for a beneficiary.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Certification Not Required
x-enumeration-literals.description: Certification is not required for this fund.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Physical Certification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Electronic certification is not acceptable and is required in physical form.(ISO20022)
